creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Hello,

The latest version of Bind (9.11.7) fails at package phase (using Synth) with the following error:
===>  Building package for bind911-9.11.7
pkg-static: Unable to access file /construction/xports/dns/bind911/work/stage/usr/local/include/dns/dnstap.pb-c.h:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop. 

Looks like this is due to enabled DNSTAP option, because with the DNSTAP set to OFF it is able to successfully package files.
